description_long: This object consists of a central rectangular metal control cabinet flanked by two large, hollow, rectangular metal posts. The central cabinet is weathered, with visible rust, grime, and a prominent 'DANGER HIGH VOLTAGE' warning label on its front face. The posts on either side are open on the inner faces, revealing internal support structures or possible conduits, and are constructed from a dark, heavy metal. The top of the central cabinet features a protruding cylindrical conduit or pipe, likely for cable entry or ventilation. The entire assembly sits on a flat, sturdy base, suggesting it is designed to be floor-standing and highly stable. The overall appearance is industrial, robust, and intended for outdoor or utility area use, with minimal decorative features and a focus on durability and safety.
description: A weathered metal control cabinet with a 'DANGER HIGH VOLTAGE' label, flanked by two large, hollow metal posts and topped with a cylindrical conduit. The structure is robust, industrial, and floor-standing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central cabinet with a warning label and the open inner faces of the two flanking posts.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, unadorned exterior of one of the posts and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view of the cabinet and posts, showing the back of the central unit and the open inner faces of the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side of the other post.
